scripts.android:init: tauri android init && node ./scripts/android-enable-cleartext.mjs && node ./scripts/android-sync-system-bars.mjs && node ./scripts/android-sync-icons.mjs
scripts.android:dev: node ./scripts/android-enable-cleartext.mjs && node ./scripts/android-sync-system-bars.mjs && node ./scripts/android-sync-icons.mjs && tauri android dev --target aarch64
scripts.android:build: node ./scripts/android-enable-cleartext.mjs && node ./scripts/android-sync-system-bars.mjs && node ./scripts/android-sync-icons.mjs && tauri android build --target aarch64 --apk
